eyebrow: Contribution | Land Degradation Observations in Africa
heroDescription: Report hotspots, brightspots, and validate false positives to support LDN monitoring.
tagline: Share knowledge. Validate data. Strengthen LDN monitoring.
intro1: The Contribution section enables users and stakeholders to submit georeferenced information on land degradation and land improvement across Africa.
intro2: It supports a participatory approach to monitoring Land Degradation Neutrality (LDN) by integrating field knowledge, expert insights, and local observations.
helpFalsePositives: Detect false positives and false negatives in datasets.
type0Title: Validation of False Positives / False Negatives
type0Desc: Identify areas where datasets may incorrectly classify land condition.
type0Item3: Description of the process causing misclassification
type0Example: Area classified as degraded but showing signs of recovery
type1Desc: Provide qualitative insights on areas identified as degraded or improved.
type1Item3: Assessment method (field survey, expert knowledge, etc.)
type1Item5: Actions taken to restore land (for brightspots)
type2Desc: Share detailed information on areas showing positive land restoration outcomes.
dataUse2: Used to improve land degradation assessments and indicators.
importantNote2: Contributions may be subject to validation before publication.
